events.text: A neighbour offers you a playful puppy. Your parents debate whether the house is ready for a pet.

choices.label: Beg to keep it
choices.resultText: The puppy becomes your best friend.

events.text: You and your sibling fight over the TV remote during the championship final.
Your family plans a road trip out of town to visit relatives.

choices.label: Help pack snacks
choices.resultText: The journey was chaotic but fun.

choices.label: Complain about the heat
choices.resultText: You survived the dusty ride anyway.

events.text: Your school starts a drama club. The teacher asks if anyone wants to audition.

choices.label: Audition
choices.resultText: You landed a small role and loved it.

events.text: A matatu conductor offers you a few shillings to help wash vehicles on a Saturday.
A local garage offers you pocket money to help wash cars on a Saturday — paid through {moneyApp}.
A friend suggests selling snacks outside school after classes — classmates pay with {moneyApp}.
Friends pressure you to skip class and hang out downtown.
A post about you circulates on social media. People are talking.

choices.label: Laugh it off
choices.resultText: It blew over in a week.

events.text: Someone you liked starts spending time with someone else. It stings.

choices.label: Talk to a friend
choices.resultText: A good chat helped you heal.

events.text: You wonder if your current path is really what you wanted at 18.
Neighbours organise a weekend cleanup of a local open space.

choices.label: Volunteer
choices.resultText: The place looked better by sunset.

events.text: You pick up photography as a weekend hobby.
You return to your car to find a parking ticket tucked under the wiper.

choices.label: Appeal at the local office
choices.resultText: The queue was longer than the fine.

events.text: Extended family members disagree about a small plot of ancestral land.
Colleagues throw a modest retirement send-off for you.

choices.label: Keep it brief
choices.resultText: You shook hands and headed home.

events.text: A young grandchild visits and asks you to tell stories about the old days.

choices.label: Share your best tales
choices.resultText: Their eyes went wide with wonder.

events.text: Your doctor suggests daily walks to keep your heart strong.

choices.label: Walk every morning
choices.resultText: You feel lighter on your feet.

events.text: You sit on the veranda and reflect on the life you've lived so far.
You're low on cash and spot an easy-looking wallet in a crowded market.

choices.label: Try to lift it
choices.resultText: You made a risky choice in the crowd.

events.text: A shop attendant is distracted. A small item sits near the counter.

choices.label: Slip it into your bag
choices.resultText: You tried your luck at the shop.

choices.label: Pay like everyone else
choices.resultText: You left with a clear head.

events.text: You're caught in a heavy downpour without an umbrella.

choices.label: Run for shelter
choices.resultText: You got soaked to the bone.

choices.label: Wait it out under an awning

events.text: You've been feeling run-down for days. A fever creeps in.

choices.label: Visit a public clinic
choices.resultText: You queued at the local clinic.

choices.label: Try home remedies
choices.resultText: Rest and tea only helped a little.

choices.label: Book private hospital care
choices.resultText: You sought private care without the long wait.

events.text: You lose your favourite toy on the way home from the shops.

choices.label: Retrace your steps
choices.resultText: You found it near the gate!

events.text: An email promises easy money if you 'help process a transfer'.

choices.label: See if you can flip it

events.text: Sports day arrives at school. Will you enter the relay or try the long jump?

choices.label: Enter the relay
choices.resultText: Your team finished mid-pack but you ran your heart out.

choices.label: Try the long jump
choices.resultText: You stuck the landing on your best attempt.

events.text: A cousin invites you to a big wedding across town.
Your community gathers for a special service. Friends invite you along.
A gym near your workplace offers a discounted annual membership.
Friends invite you to a Nollywood premiere night in Lagos.

choices.label: Dress up and go
choices.resultText: You spotted a famous actor on the red carpet.

events.text: Your family plans a weekend braai in the backyard.

choices.label: Help with the grill
choices.resultText: Stories and smoke filled the air.

choices.label: Bring drinks only
choices.resultText: You still had a great time.

events.text: The neighbourhood celebrates a festival with sweets and music.

choices.label: Stay home and study
choices.resultText: You heard the drums from your window.

events.text: You step into your new city for the first time. Shop signs greet you with {greeting}, and {transportMode} routes crisscross streets you do not yet know.

choices.label: Explore the neighbourhood
choices.resultText: You found a corner café and a friendly face.

choices.label: Unpack and rest
choices.resultText: Tomorrow you will figure out the commute.

events.text: Small things feel different abroad — the pace of a {transportMode} ride, how people queue, even what counts as a normal lunch hour.

choices.label: Laugh it off and adapt
choices.resultText: You picked up a local habit or two.

events.text: Your family schedules a video call across time zones. Everyone wants to hear how the move is going.

choices.label: Admit you miss home
choices.resultText: They promised to visit when they can.

events.text: Your qualifications from back home need local paperwork. You start browsing job listings in your new country.

choices.label: Apply widely
choices.resultText: Rejection emails arrived — but so did one interview.

choices.label: Take a starter role to get established
choices.resultText: It is not your dream job yet, but it pays the rent.

events.text: A parent teaches you cheerful phrases from both sides of your family. You love surprising relatives with them.

choices.label: Practice with siblings
choices.resultText: Everyone giggled at your accent attempts.

choices.label: Write them in your notebook
choices.resultText: A small treasure of words from two homes.

events.text: Someone in your family shows you a favourite dish from both sides of your heritage. The kitchen smells wonderful.

choices.label: Help cook together
choices.resultText: You stirred, tasted, and told stories.

choices.label: Take notes for later
choices.resultText: You promised to master the recipe someday.

events.text: Your child asks about traditions from both sides of their heritage. You smile — two cultures, one family.

choices.label: Share stories from both sides
choices.resultText: Their eyes lit up with every detail.

choices.label: Plan a celebration together
choices.resultText: You picked music and food from each heritage.
